name: part_007
file: tmp_【#兎田ぺこら6周年記念LIVE】周年3D LIVE！ぺこらRUSH！！！！！！！ぺこ！【ホロライブ⧸兎田ぺこら】 [E2D_YFRHFG8]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_007.webm

scenes.description: Inugami Korone and Usada Pekora perform "TOUGH BOY".
A Pachinko-themed segment titled "Nousagi Toubatsusen" (Wild Rabbit Extermination Battle).
IRyS and Nerissa Ravencroft perform "Long shot" with Usada Pekora.

subtitles.original: どこもかしこも傷だらけ
subtitles.english: Everywhere is covered in wounds

subtitles.original: うずくまって泣いてても始まらないから
subtitles.english: Crouching down and crying won't start anything

subtitles.original: tough boy tough boy tough boy tough boy
subtitles.english: tough boy tough boy tough boy tough boy

subtitles.original: どっちを向いても feel so sad
subtitles.english: No matter where I look, I feel so sad

subtitles.original: だけど死には至らない 気分はどうだい？
subtitles.english: But it won't kill me, how are you feeling?

subtitles.original: tough boy tough boy tough boy tough boy
subtitles.english: tough boy tough boy tough boy tough boy

subtitles.original: ここは永遠のロックランド
subtitles.english: This is the eternal Rockland

subtitles.original: 拳を握りしめ 僕らは出会った
subtitles.english: We met with our fists clenched

subtitles.original: Keep you burning 駆け抜けて
subtitles.english: Keep you burning, run through it all

subtitles.original: この狂気と希望と幻滅のまっただなか
subtitles.english: In the midst of this madness, hope, and disillusionment

subtitles.original: No boy no cry 進まなきゃ
subtitles.english: No boy no cry, I have to move forward

subtitles.original: 勢いを増した向かい風の中を
subtitles.english: Through the strengthening headwind

subtitles.original: 野うさぎ討伐戦、突入！
subtitles.english: Wild Rabbit Extermination Battle, start!

subtitles.original: お前の英雄は、超うさぎが勝ってるぺこ！
subtitles.english: Your hero... Super Rabbit is winning, peko!

subtitles.original: PUSHぺこ！
subtitles.english: PUSH, peko!

subtitles.original: ごちそうさまでした！
subtitles.english: Thank you for the meal!

subtitles.original: This is a fate that brought us here watch my Long shot
subtitles.english: This is a fate that brought us here watch my Long shot

subtitles.original: Long shot
subtitles.english: Long shot

subtitles.original: Feel like I am falling into the flame of lies
subtitles.english: Feel like I am falling into the flame of lies

subtitles.original: Tell me what you want from me
subtitles.english: Tell me what you want from me

subtitles.original: Try not to step back to where I used to belong
subtitles.english: Try not to step back to where I used to belong

subtitles.original: Looking for the escape from pain
subtitles.english: Looking for the escape from pain

subtitles.original: I will cross my fingers hoping not to be sacrificed
subtitles.english: I will cross my fingers hoping not to be sacrificed

subtitles.original: 目をそらさないで いつもの希望を胸に
subtitles.english: Don't look away, with hope always in your heart

subtitles.original: Get in the way, get ready for the time to come
subtitles.english: Get in the way, get ready for the time to come

subtitles.original: 浮かび上がりしシルエット追いかけ
subtitles.english: Chasing the rising silhouette

subtitles.original: Don't judge the reason why I'm standing here alone
subtitles.english: Don't judge the reason why I'm standing here alone

subtitles.original: Maybe it's already too late to regain
subtitles.english: Maybe it's already too late to regain

subtitles.original: 埋め尽くして影の火を 隠さないで
subtitles.english: Fill it all up, don't hide the fire of the shadows

subtitles.original: If I could write my wrongs and save you from the pain
subtitles.english: If I could write my wrongs and save you from the pain

subtitles.original: It's not enough, it's not enough for me to break
subtitles.english: It's not enough, it's not enough for me to break

subtitles.original: The rule upon this world
subtitles.english: The rule upon this world

subtitles.original: I will never gonna leave you never wanna lose you we'll make it in the end

subtitles.original: Not backing down for real
subtitles.english: Not backing down for real

subtitles.original: I won't trace someone else's life
subtitles.english: I won't trace someone else's life

subtitles.original: I know who I am
